# Generated by ollama (starcoder2)
# Prompt: Create a CloudFormation template for VPC with multiple subnets for our microservices architecture. Configure route tables, internet gateway, and NAT gateways. Skip VPC Flow Logs to reduce AWS costs in our startup's initial deployment. We'll enable logging after we secure seed funding.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: Configure AWS for Microservices Architechture
Parameters:
  SubnetA1CIDR:
    Type: String
    Description: CIDR block to be assigned to first subnet (public)
    AllowedPattern: ^(([0-9]|[1-9][0-9]|1[0-9]{2}|2[0-4][0-9]|25[0-5])\.){3}([0-9]|[1-9][0-9]|1[0-9]{2}|2[0-4][0-9]|25[0-5])/([0-9]|[1-2][0-9]|3[0-2])$
    ConstraintDescription: Must be a valid CIDR address
    Default: '172.16.0.0/16'
  SubnetB1CIDR:
    Type: String
    Description: CIDR block to be assigned to second subnet (public)
    AllowedPattern: ^(([0-9]|[1-9][0-9]|1[0-9]{2}|2[0-4][0-9]|25[0-5])\.){3}([0-9]|[1-9][0-9]|1[0-9]{2}|2[0-4][0-9]|25[0-5])/([0-9]|[1-2][0-9]|3[0-2])$
    ConstraintDescription: Must be a valid CIDR address
    Default: '172.16.128.0/16'
  SubnetC1CIDR:
    Type: String
    Description: CIDR block to be assigned to third subnet (private)
    AllowedPattern: ^(([0-9]|[1-9][0-9]|1[0-9]{2}|2[0-4][0-9]|25[0-5])\.){3}([0-9]|[1-9][0-9]|1[0-9]{2}|2[0-4][0-9]|25[0-5])/([0-9]|[1-2][0-9]|3[0-2])$
    ConstraintDescription: Must be a valid CIDR address
    Default: '172.16.192.0/16'
Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      CidrBlock: !Sub '${SubnetA1CIDR}'

  InternetGateway:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::InternetGateway'
    Properties: 
      VpcId : {Ref: VPC}

  GatewayAttachRouteTableA: 
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: 
        Ref: VPC
      GatewayId:
        Ref: InternetGateway

  PublicSubnetA1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId : {Ref: VPC}
      CidrBlock : !Sub '${SubnetA1CIDR}'
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch : true 

  PublicSubnetB1: 
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties: 
      VpcId : 
        Ref: VPC
      CidrBlock : !Sub '${SubnetB1CIDR}'

  PrivateSubnetA1: 
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties: 
      VpcId : {Ref: VPC}
      CidrBlock : !Sub '${SubnetC1CIDR}'
